title: [EXAMPLE] Nordic-490 demonstrator — live state
description: EXAMPLE ENTRY (not yet live): illustrates what a hosted EDiT 'house' dataset will look like once the Nordic-490 demonstrator is running. Planned content: steady-state AC power-flow results for the Nordic-490 bus model, driven by current weather and production forecasts scaled to the model, one snapshot every 5 minutes. The endpoint below is a placeholder and does not yet serve data.
spatialCoverage: Nordic synchronous area (SE, NO, FI, DK-east)

distribution.note: EXAMPLE / placeholder endpoint — the Nordic-490 demonstrator is in development and this URL does not yet serve data. Shown to illustrate the shape of a hosted house dataset.
